root_nodes.content: Bootstrap and revalidate the ideal-base authority. Expand the prescribed W0 children, reconcile drift, and seed durable state before mutation.
Close runtime ownership and persistence. Expand prescribed W1 children and synthesize only after activity/shutdown, background status, and MCP gates pass.
Close recovery reconciliation and global resource bounds. Expand prescribed W2 children and finish with the integrated lifecycle matrix.
Make deterministic validation and packaging authoritative. Expand prescribed W3 children and close with the full deterministic integration gate.
Close security, quality, provenance, and durable-state hygiene. Expand prescribed W4 children and obtain independent verification.
Disposition external gates, run final deterministic signoff twice, obtain independent critique, and synthesize the ideal-base verdict.

W0.content: Revalidate Git, worktree, runtime-channel, selfdev, protected hash, archive, and authorization facts against BASELINE.md.
acceptance_gates: python3 scripts/ideal_base_railway.py check
git status --short
git worktree list --porcelain
sha256sum docs/fork/recovery/ORCHESTRATOR_PROMPT.md

W0.content: Re-audit the source seams named by the graph and inject any source-confirmed missing work before implementation.
acceptance_gates: Every retained seam cites current file:symbol evidence
Every removed seam has a source-backed stale/duplicate explanation

W0.content: Seed or resume the deep task graph from validated WORK_GRAPH.json and STATE.json; verify ownership and dependency projections.
acceptance_gates: python3 scripts/ideal_base_railway.py next --json
Deep task graph accepts the projected runnable wave

W1.content: Design one testable shutdown coordinator and server activity-lease authority, including work-class census and exit reasons.
acceptance_gates: Pure lifecycle state model covers every normal exit and active work class
Independent architecture critique finds no owner/lease gap

W1.content: Implement work-aware activity leases and route normal daemon exits through the bounded shutdown coordinator.
acceptance_gates: Idle exit requires zero clients and zero active leases
SIGTERM, reload, persistent idle, and temporary-owner exits invoke bounded shutdown

W1.content: Verify activity leases across provider fixtures, restored/headless turns, debug jobs, background jobs, MCP calls, and swarm waiters.
acceptance_gates: Short-timeout no-provider fixtures remain alive for each lease class and exit after release
No socket/process residue

W1.content: Implement an atomic serialized TaskStatusStore for background tasks; surface persistence failures and preserve terminal precedence.
acceptance_gates: No direct non-atomic status-file writes remain
Live task is not removed before terminal persistence succeeds or is durably recoverable
Status-serialization and write failures are surfaced, not swallowed

W1.content: Verify background status concurrency, crash interruption, malformed files, orphan reconciliation, and cleanup.
acceptance_gates: Concurrent progress/delivery/completion never tears JSON or overwrites terminal truth
Startup reconciles malformed/orphaned state without false success

W1.content: Implement explicit pooled MCP child ownership, bounded pre-exit reap, and mcp-serve owner-PID self-liveness.
acceptance_gates: Pooled children receive the owning daemon PID
Shutdown coordinator disconnects and reaps all tracked children within grace

W1.content: Implement dead and hung pooled MCP detection, cache eviction, cooldown, and one bounded reconnect.
acceptance_gates: Killed child is detected before request timeout
Hung child is detected by health deadline
Exactly one reconnect succeeds without daemon reload

W1.content: Run the integrated MCP and lifecycle adversarial gate across all exit, kill, hang, reconnect, and residue cases.
acceptance_gates: Zero surviving owned descendants in every exit mode
All activity and status durability matrices pass repeatedly

W2.content: Add timestamped selfdev pending-activation reconciliation using initiating-session liveness and candidate identity.
acceptance_gates: Dead session plus valid candidate completes safely
Missing/bad candidate rolls back
Live canary is preserved

W2.content: Persist disconnect-cleanup intent before live-session removal; retry after abort and reconcile at startup.
acceptance_gates: Agent-lock timeout leaves a durable cleanup record
Restart marks session terminal and clears the record

W2.content: Independently verify activation and disconnect reconciliation under crash, restart, missing files, and live-owner cases.
acceptance_gates: All recovery matrices pass with no false rollback or fabricated terminal state

W2.content: Add configurable global caps and observability for shared MCP children and live background tasks.
acceptance_gates: Low test caps bound process/task/file counts
Refusal is explicit
Capacity releases after terminal cleanup

W2.content: Verify caps under concurrent starts, failures, cancellation, and restart reconciliation.
acceptance_gates: No over-admission or leaked capacity under concurrency
Restart does not double-count stale owners

W2.content: Build and run the complete no-provider real-process lifecycle matrix for all W1 and W2 invariants.
acceptance_gates: Repeated clean runs cover cancel, exit, reload, crash, restart, recovery, and residue
No provider/network dependency

W3.content: Audit CI test hermeticity and classify every ignored test as deterministic, live, GUI, platform, helper, or performance.
acceptance_gates: Every compile-only/advisory decision has a source-backed reason and exit condition
No unclassified ignore remains

W3.content: Promote hermetic real-process cancellation, reload, client re-exec, retry, and restart cases into required suites.
acceptance_gates: No required lifecycle case remains ignored for build-layout convenience
Fixtures use disposable home/runtime and leave zero residue

W3.content: Make intended Linux, macOS, app-core, and deterministic TUI test rails blocking on push/PR.
acceptance_gates: Injected failures in each rail fail CI semantics
jcode-tui deterministic tests run rather than compile-only

W3.content: Build and launch the real Nix package on relevant pull requests without enabling non-hermetic package doCheck blindly.
acceptance_gates: Relevant path changes run nix build
result/bin/jcode --version succeeds

W3.content: Package and verify mobile static assets from an executable-adjacent or declared share path outside the source checkout.
acceptance_gates: Installed binary outside checkout serves index.html
CWD fallback cannot mask missing packaged assets

W3.content: Extend hermetic installer and Rust updater acquisition fixtures through real local daemon reload and rollback.
acceptance_gates: Checksum, interruption, invalid replacement, rollback, and exactly-once reload paths pass without network
Every failure preserves old runtime/channel pointers

W3.content: Run the full deterministic CI/package/updater integration gate from clean state twice.
acceptance_gates: All required suites, Nix build, installed assets, and updater matrix pass twice at one commit

W4.content: Add expiring security-advisory policy and strict GitHub host verification for Homebrew publication.
acceptance_gates: Expired ignore fails policy
Homebrew path uses pinned known_hosts and no StrictHostKeyChecking=no

W4.content: Add explicit downward quality targets and zero-growth critical-path budgets without demanding an all-at-once cleanup.
acceptance_gates: New critical-path panic/swallow/oversize debt fails
Repository debt trend is reported and cannot increase

W4.content: Pin compatibility build inputs and emit verifiable source/version provenance and SBOM for the declared reproducible artifact subset.
acceptance_gates: Two clean builds match within the declared reproducible scope
Artifacts expose verifiable provenance and SBOM

W4.content: Centralize socket/metadata cleanup; diagnose and quarantine malformed swarm state; bound terminal control-log retention.
acceptance_gates: Live listener preserves all sidecars
Stale cleanup removes all sidecars/registry metadata
Malformed state warns and quarantines
Terminal logs obey retention

W4.content: Sweep dead active PID markers at startup/periodically and make telemetry active-session markers process-liveness aware; remove the uncompiled duplicate after equivalence review.
acceptance_gates: Dead markers without session JSON disappear at startup
Only live PID telemetry markers count
Full build proves duplicate removal safe

W4.content: Independently verify all hardening and durable-state hygiene changes and inject any cleanup or policy gaps.
acceptance_gates: No critical policy, provenance, durable-state, marker, or cleanup gap remains

W5.content: Build/smoke aarch64-linux or explicitly downgrade its advertised support to best-effort.
acceptance_gates: Accepted build/smoke evidence or explicit support downgrade

W5.content: Run authorized provider-doctor minimal tier and fresh full pre-release catalog tier.
W5.authorization: live provider credentials, network, and spend
acceptance_gates: Fresh catalog coverage or authorization_blocked with named next action

W5.content: Run mobile/iOS simulator or device attach validation after local gateway fixtures remain green.
acceptance_gates: Attach lifecycle passes or authorization_blocked with named next action

W5.content: Run scheduled Windows and FreeBSD compile/install smokes if those surfaces remain advertised.
acceptance_gates: Scheduled smoke evidence or explicit support disposition

W5.content: Run disposable draft-release acquisition and live updater smoke without publishing a public release.
W5.authorization: disposable credentials/assets and network release API
acceptance_gates: Draft acquisition/update succeeds and cleans up, or authorization_blocked

W5.content: Run the complete deterministic ideal-base matrix twice from clean state at one fixed commit and prove zero residue.
acceptance_gates: All A0-A7 deterministic gates pass twice
Exact source/runtime identity recorded
Zero owned residue

W5.content: Perform independent adversarial final review of the exact signoff commit, graph coverage, evidence, and external-gate honesty.
acceptance_gates: No unresolved blocker omission, false pass, material mis-ranking, or stale evidence

W5.content: Synthesize the final ideal-base disposition; hand checkpoint content to the coordinator for atomic state update and local commit without pushing.
acceptance_gates: Every mandatory node accepted
Every gated node accepted or authorization_blocked
Worktree clean after local signoff commit

audit_coverage.item: Work-aware server activity and bounded shutdown authority
Atomic serialized recoverable background-task status persistence
Pooled MCP child ownership and bounded reap
Global MCP and background resource bounds
Real Nix package build and launch
Hermetic installer and updater acquisition fixtures
Security advisory expiry and strict Homebrew host identity
Pinned compatibility inputs, provenance, and SBOM
Socket and durable swarm state hygiene
Disposable draft-release and live updater smoke
